items.title: Golang Backend Systems
items.summary: Design and delivery of production Go services, gRPC APIs, microservices, service boundaries, and backend platforms that can operate under real load.
proofPoints: Built services processing terabytes of manufacturing data weekly
Migrated critical Debit Card Services from Java to Golang

items.title: Event-Driven Platforms
items.summary: Reliable asynchronous systems using Kafka, Google Pub/Sub, Azure Service Bus, routing mechanisms, validation pipelines, and real-time coordination.
proofPoints: Architected routing across heterogeneous messaging infrastructures
Developed Kafka-driven workflows for real-time service coordination

items.title: Secure Cloud Delivery
items.summary: Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD, vulnerability scanning, compliance remediation, and security-aware backend delivery.
proofPoints: Achieved zero open compliance issues in production delivery
Reduced security incidents by 30% through audits and vulnerability reviews
